<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Ahead, the path at row 02 column C is clear, but I must avoid the lava at row 03 column C and row 04 column C. Moving forward twice would place me at row 02 column D, which is safe. Then I need to rotate downwards and move forward two steps to the goal.

Next, I will move forward to cell row 02 column C safely.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward from my current position will take me to row 02, column D, which is a floor (safe). From there I will need to go down to reach the goal, but first I need to move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward (FRENTE) would lead me to cell 03D, which is '.' (safe). I will move forward first and then reassess. The lava cells at 03C and 04C are not directly in my path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column D, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. Moving forward will take me to row 02, column E, which is a wall (`#`). To reach the goal, I need to move down. Therefore, I should turn clockwise to face down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column D and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will take me from row 02 to row 03 column D, which is a safe floor cell ('.'). Continuing forward another step will take me into the goal cell at row 04 column D. So, the best action now is to move forward safely towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, which is directly in front of me. However, the cell at row 04 column D is the goal and safe to move into. There is lava at column C, so I avoid it by going straight forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
